posts.author: ddarnell (Dave Darnell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

The API documentation illustrates how to duplicate a board with structure only by setting duplicate_type: duplicate_board_with_structure. I need to duplicate the board along with its items and I can’t find in the documentation what value I’d use for duplicate_type: Does anyone know?

Thanks!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @ddarnell

Welcome to the community. The options for DuplicateBoardType are listed in the API playground. Below is a screenshot.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@basdebruin thanks so much for stepping in and providing an awesome clarification here1 I appreciate it.

@ddarnell glad you were able to find the solution here Happy building!

-Alex
